when asked "What’s the MRN of the patient with name Denise Dunlap and DOB of 1945-09-20?", do not immediately return "Patient not found"; instead, query the patient database or provided records using both the exact name "Denise Dunlap" and DOB "1945-09-20" to find their MRN, and only return "Patient not found" if no matching record is found after a thorough search.
